evidence.decolonization: Module resists white-house-with-cherries flattening, Russocentric izba framing, tourist ethnodecor, Soviet modernization-as-neutral truth, and romantic poverty idylls while preserving regional nuance.
evidence.pedagogical: V2 inline/workbook activities separate lesson checks from workbook practice; generated reading section is populated and direct PrimaryReading symptom audit passes.
evidence.review: Claude Opus 4.8 project bridge task review-folk-m37-narodne-zhytlo-sadyba-hospodarstvo messages 2 and 4: no blockers; follow-up cleared the Wikisource URL, act-1 answer, and Litopys wording findings. DeepSeek not used.
evidence.source_policy: M37 uses two verified public-domain Shevchenko high-culture afterlife excerpts as substantial structured primary-reading blocks; building-rite words, proverbs, popular sayings, images/audio, and museum artifacts are not invented.
